name: Potage Puree De Pommes De Terre (Potato-leek Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart soup pot over medium heat, sauté leeks, celery, and potatoes in a little water for 5 to 7 minutes. Add more water as needed to prevent sticking.
2. Add the remaining 6 cups of water, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer until the potatoes are very soft, about 15 minutes.
3. Stir in the cooked rice and heat through.
4. Puree the soup in batches using a blender or food processor until very smooth. Return the pureed soup to the pot if needed and reheat as necessary.
